mapper.sql: id, parent_id, dict_code, dict_name, sort_num, status, remark
mapper.select:
select
from sys_dict where parent_id = 0
and ( dict_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dict_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(remark, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by sort_num asc, id asc

select
from sys_dict where parent_id = #{parentId}
and ( dict_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dict_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(remark, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by sort_num asc, id asc

select
from sys_dict where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dict(parent_id, dict_code, dict_name, sort_num, status, remark) values(#{parentId}, #{dictCode}, #{dictName}, #{sortNum}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update sys_dict set parent_id = #{parentId}, dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_name = #{dictName}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from sys_dict where parent_id = 0 and status = 'enabled'
and dict_code = #{code}
order by sort_num asc, id asc

select
from sys_dict where parent_id = #{parentId} and status = 'enabled' order by sort_num asc, id asc

select
from sys_dict where parent_id in ( select id from sys_dict where parent_id = 0 and dict_code = #{typeCode} ) and status = 'enabled' order by sort_num asc, id asc
